test_objectives: Create a secure, intuitive, and efficient login dashboard for the VWO login experience that seamlessly connects users to VWO's powerful optimization platform while maintaining enterprise-grade security standards and exceptional user experience.
scope:
The test plan scope includes all features described in the Product Requirements Document (PRD) for the VWO login dashboard, with the following components included: 
   •
   Authentication System
   •
   Login Process
   •
   User Input Validation
   •
   Password Management
   •
   Interface Design
   •
   Accessibility Features
   •
   Branding and Visual Design
   •
   Security Specifications
   •
   Data Protection
   •
   Compliance Standards
   •
   Load Time Optimization
   •
   Scalability
   •
   Platform Integrations
   •
   Third-Party Services
   •
   New User Experience
   •
   Returning User Experience
   •
   Error Recovery Flow
   Out of scope includes:
   Integrations with other VWO features or products
   Customized branding and visual design
   Advanced analytics and optimization features

detailed_test_cases.title: TC-01: Authentication System - Valid User Credentials
detailed_test_cases.preconditions: User has not logged in previously and has a valid VWO account
steps: Step 1: Enter valid username and password in the login form
detailed_test_cases.expected_result: User should be successfully logged in and redirected to the VWO dashboard

detailed_test_cases.title: TC-02: Login Process - Invalid User Credentials
detailed_test_cases.preconditions: User has not logged in previously and has an invalid VWO account
steps: Step 1: Enter invalid username and password in the login form
detailed_test_cases.expected_result: User should see an error message indicating incorrect username or password

detailed_test_cases.title: TC-03: User Input Validation - Empty Fields
detailed_test_cases.preconditions: User has not logged in previously
steps: Step 1: Leave username and password fields empty in the login form
detailed_test_cases.expected_result: User should see error messages indicating required fields are empty

detailed_test_cases.title: TC-04: Password Management - Forgot Password
detailed_test_cases.preconditions: User has not logged in previously
steps: Step 2: Enter email address in the forgot password form
detailed_test_cases.expected_result: User should receive an email to reset password

detailed_test_cases.title: TC-05: Interface Design - Responsive Design
detailed_test_cases.preconditions: User is on a mobile device
steps: Step 1: Navigate to the VWO login page on mobile device
detailed_test_cases.expected_result: Login form should be responsive and adaptable to mobile screen size

non_functional_scenarios: Security: Validate VWO login page for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities (e.g., SQL Injection, Cross-Site Scripting)
Usability: Conduct user experience testing to ensure VWO login page meets VWO's usability standards (e.g., color schemes, typography, accessibility)
api_test_scenarios: API authentication tests: Verify correct authentication using VWO's authentication API
API integration tests: Verify successful integration with VWO's platform integrations
risk_analysis:
Key risks include:
   •
   Security vulnerabilities in the login page (e.g., SQL Injection, Cross-Site Scripting)
   •
   Performance issues due to inadequate testing or insufficient resources
   •
   Compliance and standard risks due to missing or inadequate security features
test_data_requirements: VWO test data, including valid and invalid user credentials
entry_criteria: A valid VWO user account and a valid test environment are required to execute the test plan
exit_criteria: The test plan is complete and all functional and non-functional requirements are met
